intro:
I couldn't find any information on Pyrus vertesensis. However, I found information on Pyrus communis, also known as the European pear. 

Pyrus communis is a deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the pear tree. The health benefits of Pyrus communis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Pyrus communis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which have been shown to contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pyrus communis include pear juice, pear tea, and pear extract, which are often used to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression.
